Amritmahal.physical_characteristics: Grey coat fading to white, long tapering muzzle, narrow forehead, and long, sharp horns.

Ayrshire.origin: Scotland (Exotic breed used in Indian crossbreeding)
Ayrshire.physical_characteristics: Red and white markings, medium to large size, known for strong udder conformation.

Bargur.physical_characteristics: Brown body with white patterns, well-built and compact, known for stamina and speed.

Dangi.physical_characteristics: Distinct white coat with red or black spots, exudes an oily secretion protecting from heavy rain.

Deoni.physical_characteristics: Mainly white with irregular black spots, prominent forehead, drooping ears.

Gir.physical_characteristics: Reddish color, prominent dome-shaped forehead, long pendulous ears folded like a leaf.

Hallikar.physical_characteristics: White to light grey coat, long horns sloping backward with an inward curve.

Hariana.physical_characteristics: White or light grey coat, compact body, long and narrow face, well-developed hump.

Himachali Pahari.physical_characteristics: Small to medium size, coat color varies including black, brown, and grey, adapted to hilly terrain.

Kangayam.physical_characteristics: Grey or white coat, dark forequarters and hindquarters in males, stout horns spreading apart.

Kankrej.physical_characteristics: Silver-grey to iron-grey coat, very large lyre-shaped horns, famous for unique gait called Sawai chal.

Kenkatha.origin: Madhya Pradesh and Uttar Pradesh, India
Kenkatha.physical_characteristics: Small, compact body, greyish to copperish coat, short face, dark muzzle.

Khariar.physical_characteristics: Brownish or grey coat, short horns, small size but sturdy, well-adapted to local climate.

Khillari.physical_characteristics: Greyish white coat, long and tightly curved horns, fast runners with great endurance.

Konkan Kapila.physical_characteristics: Small to medium build, reddish to brownish coat, well-adapted to heavy rainfall regions.

Kosali.physical_characteristics: Small size, brownish or greyish coat, prominent horns, very active and suitable for plowing.

Krishna_Valley.physical_characteristics: Grey-white coat, massive built, broad and short forehead, short horns.

Ladakhi.physical_characteristics: Small size, black or brown coat, well-adapted to extreme cold and high altitude.

Lakhimi.physical_characteristics: Small size, variable coat color, suited for marshy land and heavy rainfall regions.

Malnad_gidda.physical_characteristics: Dwarf breed, dark brown to black coat, disease-resistant, agile in forest terrain.

Mewati.origin: Rajasthan, Haryana, and Uttar Pradesh, India
Mewati.physical_characteristics: Similar to Hariana but with a slightly more prominent forehead, generally white coat.

Nari.physical_characteristics: White to greyish coat, distinctive long and curved horns, medium body size.

Nimari.physical_characteristics: Copper-red coat with large whitish patches splashing over the body, agile and hardy.

Ongole.physical_characteristics: Large size, glossy white coat, prominent muscular hump, short stumpy horns.

Poda Thirupu.physical_characteristics: Brown and white patches, energetic draught animals, straight strong horns.

Pulikulam.physical_characteristics: Dark grey to black coat, sharply pointed horns, highly aggressive and agile (used in Jallikattu).

Punganur.physical_characteristics: Dwarf breed, white or light grey coat, short horns, one of the smallest cattle breeds globally.

Purnea.physical_characteristics: Small to medium size, predominantly grey coat, used for agricultural operations.

Rathi.physical_characteristics: Brown with white patches or solid brown, medium sized, docile nature, adaptable to arid regions.

Red kandhari.physical_characteristics: Deep red to dark brown coat color, broad and prominent forehead, strong built.

Red_Sindhi.physical_characteristics: Deep red color, compact frame, thick horns emerging laterally, heavy udder.

Sahiwal.physical_characteristics: Reddish brown to pale red coat, loose skin, heavy hump, prominent dewlap, very heat tolerant.

Shweta Kapila.physical_characteristics: Striking pure white coat, white skin, horns, hooves and muzzle. Short to medium stature.

Tharparkar.physical_characteristics: White or light grey coat, broad forehead, lyre-shaped horns, highly disease resistant.

Umblachery.physical_characteristics: Grey coat, white star on forehead, distinct white markings on the limbs and tail-switch.

Vechur.physical_characteristics: Extremely small (dwarf) breed, light red, black or white coat, low feed requirements.

bachaur.physical_characteristics: Grey or light grey color, compact body, prominent but small hump, short horizontal ears.

badri.physical_characteristics: Small hill cattle, black, brown, or red coat, sure-footed for hilly terrains.

bhelai.physical_characteristics: Mixed coat colors with white patches, migratory cattle, adapted to semi-arid ecosystems.

dagri.physical_characteristics: Small built, predominantly white coat, primarily used by tribal communities for plowing.

gangatari.physical_characteristics: White or grey coat, medium size, prominent hump, well-adapted to riverine plains.

gaolao.physical_characteristics: White coat, light and agile build, long and narrow face, backward curving horns.

ghumsari.physical_characteristics: Small size, white or light grey coat, medium horns, hardy for draft work in hot climates.

kherigarh.physical_characteristics: White coat, narrow face, large bright eyes, upstanding horns, energetic and active.

malvi.physical_characteristics: Grey to white coat, broad poll, strong and sturdy legs, ideal for hard agricultural work.

motu.physical_characteristics: Small, dwarf-like size, brownish or greyish coat, very hardy and thrives on poor pasture.

nagori.physical_characteristics: Large frame, white coat, long and narrow face, famous as fine swift trotters.

ponwar.physical_characteristics: Brown or black coat with distinct white spots, small but tightly knit body, active nature.

siri.physical_characteristics: Thick coat of hair for cold protection, black and white or red and white coat, strong hump.

thutho.physical_characteristics: Medium to large size, mostly black or brown, robust frame suitable for hilly terrains.
